name: product-kb-system
description: Local-first ecommerce product knowledge workflows and repository template.

interface.shortDescription: Local-first SKU product knowledge workflows for AI agents.
interface.longDescription: Initialize and maintain version-controlled ecommerce product knowledge repositories with YAML, Markdown, media manifests, validation, exports, and an optional local API.
defaultPrompt: Initialize a local product knowledge repository from the template.
Add a new SKU-level product knowledge entry.
Validate and export customer-support context from this product knowledge repo.
